LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_OrbitalFarmhand.title: orbital farmhand
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_OrbitalFarmhand.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up maintaining hydroponic bays on a crowded orbital station. Zero-gravity crop rotations and battling fungal infestations taught [PAWN_objective] plant mastery, but left [PAWN_pronoun] unprepared for terrestrial life.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_GlowbeltScavenger.title: glowbelt scavenger
rad child
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_GlowbeltScavenger.descr: Raised in the irradiated ruins of a failed arcology, [PAWN_nameDef] learned to harvest salvage from autonomous defense systems still guarding dead tech. Constant radiation exposure left [PAWN_objective] strangely resilient but socially feral.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_CorpseHauler.title: corpse hauler’s apprentice
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_CorpseHauler.descriptio: After a plague wiped out a frontier colony, [PAWN_nameDef] was put to work stacking bodies for the burn pits. Death became routine, and [PAWN_pronoun] developed a grim practicality that unsettled others.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_RefugeeCaretaker.title: refugee caretaker
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_RefugeeCaretaker.descri: Born into a displaced colony fleet, [PAWN_nameDef] grew up tending to the sick and wounded aboard overcrowded ships. With resources scarce and suffering constant, [PAWN_pronoun] learned that kindness was sometimes the only thing left to give.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_BattalionFoundling.desc: Orphaned during a planetary campaign, [PAWN_nameDef] was taken in by a roving battalion and raised among hardened soldiers. Between maintenance drills and live-fire exercises, [PAWN_pronoun] learned that survival was earned, not granted.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_Deathworlder01.title: deathworlder
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_Deathworlder02.title: deathworlder
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_DesertNomad01.title: desert nomad
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_Voidborn.title: voidborn
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_IceWorld.title: iceworlder
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_PenalWorld.title: penal world
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_SlumDweller.title: slum dweller
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_JopallIndebted.title: indebted child
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_Waterworld.title: Waterworld
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_Observer.title: observer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_Deathworlder01.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up maintaining hydroponic bays on a crowded orbital station. Zero-gravity crop rotations and battling fungal infestations taught [PAWN_objective] plant mastery, but left [PAWN_pronoun] unprepared for terrestrial life.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_Deathworlder02.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up maintaining hydroponic bays on a crowded orbital station. Zero-gravity crop rotations and battling fungal infestations taught [PAWN_objective] plant mastery, but left [PAWN_pronoun] unprepared for terrestrial life.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_DesertNomad01.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up maintaining hydroponic bays on a crowded orbital station. Zero-gravity crop rotations and battling fungal infestations taught [PAWN_objective] plant mastery, but left [PAWN_pronoun] unprepared for terrestrial life.

LanguageData.UB_BTC_Childhood_Observer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up maintaining hydroponic bays on a crowded orbital station. Zero-gravity crop rotations and battling fungal infestations taught [PAWN_objective] plant mastery, but left [PAWN_pronoun] unprepared for terrestrial life.
